videos.title: AI Agents - Problem Solving AI Agents Explained
videos.description: This video provides a foundational understanding of AI agents, covering their definition, components (agent function, agent program), performance measures, environments (PEAS description), and various types like simple reflex, model-based reflex, goal-based, and utility-based agents. Essential for grasping the core concepts.

videos.title: Intelligent Agents in AI | Types of Intelligent Agents | With Examples
videos.description: A concise overview that dives into the different types of intelligent agents, such as simple reflex, model-based reflex, goal-based, utility-based, and learning agents. It uses practical examples to illustrate how each agent type operates, reinforcing the concepts introduced in foundational texts.

videos.title: What are LLM Agents?
videos.description: Andrej Karpathy, a leading expert in AI, explains the concept of LLM (Large Language Model) Agents. This video discusses the paradigm shift from traditional AI models to autonomous agents capable of perceiving, reasoning, and acting in complex environments, crucial for understanding modern advancements.

videos.title: The Rise of LLM Agents
videos.description: From DeepLearning.AI, this video explores the emergence and capabilities of LLM-powered agents. It covers their architecture, how they interact with tools, and practical examples of their use in various applications, providing a contemporary perspective on agent design and implementation.

videos.title: AI Agents Explained: From Traditional Agents to LLM-Powered Agents
videos.description: This video bridges the gap between classical AI agent theory and the latest developments in LLM-powered agents. It provides context on the evolution of agent design, highlighting how large language models are enabling more sophisticated and autonomous behaviors in modern AI systems.

videos.title: How to Build a Successful AI Business (Full Presentation)
videos.description: Andrew Ng, a leading figure in AI, provides a comprehensive overview of building a successful AI business, covering everything from selecting the right problem to data strategy, product-market fit, and scaling. Essential for understanding the strategic aspects of launching and monetizing AI.

videos.title: AI Business Models Explained with Examples
videos.description: This video breaks down various business models applicable to AI products and services, illustrating each with practical examples. It helps learners understand different monetization strategies, such as SaaS, API-as-a-service, platform models, and more, for AI-driven solutions.

videos.title: MLOps Explained Simply: The Complete Guide
videos.description: While not solely about business models, this video provides a foundational understanding of MLOps (Machine Learning Operations). It explains how deploying and managing AI models in production environments is critical for consistent performance, scalability, and ultimately, the continuous delivery of value that enables monetization.

videos.title: Building and Launching AI Products - What I learned at Google
videos.description: This presentation offers practical insights into the process of building and launching AI products, drawing from experience at a major tech company. It covers key considerations for product strategy, MVP development, user experience, and go-to-market approaches specific to AI solutions.

videos.title: Making money from Generative AI
videos.description: Scott Belsky of Adobe discusses the unique monetization opportunities and business models emerging with Generative AI. This video provides a timely perspective on how to create value and generate revenue from the latest advancements in AI technology.
